---
name: Architecture Discussion
about: Challenge an architectural decision, propose an alternative, or raise a design concern
title: "[ARCH] "
labels: architecture
assignees: ''
---

## What are you challenging or proposing?

<!-- Be specific. Reference the relevant ADR, README section, or component if applicable. -->

## Your background / context

<!-- What gives you perspective on this? (SC practitioner, graph engineer, AI builder, etc.)
This helps us understand the frame of reference. -->

## The issue with the current design (if applicable)

<!-- Where does the current design break? Real-world scenario or technical argument preferred over opinion. -->

## Your proposal (if any)

<!-- What would you do differently? Even a rough idea is valuable. -->

## Trade-offs you see

<!-- What does your approach gain? What does it cost? -->

---

*We value direct, technical arguments. "I think X would be better" is less useful than "X breaks when Y happens because Z."*
